description: Diagnostic triage when board is powered at 20V via DCPS (bypassing PD negotiation). Tests full power chain at operating voltage.
WARNING: M1 board. Direct 20V input bypasses CD3217 PD negotiation. Use current-limited supply. If board draws >3A at 20V immediately, there is a short - DO NOT continue.

initial_conditions.power_supply: 20V via USB-C (DCPS mode, current limited to 3A)

if_overcurrent.diagnosis: Short circuit on input or PPBUS_AON
actions: Disconnect immediately
Check diode mode on PPVBUS caps
Check for short on PPBUS_AON bulk caps
Check charger IC U5200 for dead short
Use thermal imaging at low voltage (5V, current limited) to find hot component
Check U5200 charger IC
Check CHGR_AUX_OK (page 24)
At 20V, charger should pass through even without full PD sequence
Check for open MOSFETs in charger path
Check PPVAON_PWR_EN
Check PPVAON_FAULT_L
Check for short on PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN (common fault on M1 boards)
Thermal imaging on PP3V8_AON distribution
If PP3V8_AON is shorted: systematically lift caps to isolate fault

if_any_missing.diagnosis: AON LDO or PMU LDO fault
actions: Check specific missing rail's source IC
Thermal imaging on faulty rail
If UC100/UC200 output missing: check input PP3V8_AON_VODMAN

if_missing.diagnosis: Standalone VR enable or IC fault
actions: Check P5VS2_PWR_EN (should be asserted by PMU GPIO after PMU startup)
Check P3V3S2_PWR_EN
If enable present: VR IC fault or output short
Diode mode on output caps to check for short

steps.expected: Multiple voltage domains present at SoC pins (pages 11-15)
actions: Check SERA BUCK 0 output (PCPU DVFS) - should be present if SoC is awake
Check SERA BUCK 11 output (ECPU DVFS)
Check PMU_ACTIVE_READY signal
If all power present but no boot: SoC fault, SPI ROM fault, or NAND fault

steps.expected: Apple logo on external display or panel

actions: Check display connector (page 67)
Check UP700/UP705/UP715 sequencer outputs (page 68)
Check DP600 (BEN) backlight boost (page 69)
Check eDP data lanes
Try external display via USB-C (if Thunderbolt is functional)
